channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important Expect security releases to appear here within 24 hours of being reported upstream. Release Created Date Description 3.0.0-alpha1 2019-09-08T17:46:16Z Features/Updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.7.5 Update Lightning to 4.0.4 Move to Layout Builder Migrations updated with Layout Builder support Page Title / Tabs support for Layout Builder Upgrade path: Update your codebase: composer update Run database updates:
